public_contract.primary_function: score_prize_aware_ticket(lottery_type, predicted_main_numbers, actual_main_numbers, predicted_second_zone=None, actual_second_zone=None, actual_special_number=None) -> dict
public_contract.module_level_path: lottery_api/prize_aware_scorer.py (flat module, no package/__init__.py, per task whitelist; differs from the P271B-proposed lottery_api/research/prize_aware_scoring/ package path — file-structure choice only, semantics unchanged)

validation_contract.lottery_type: must be one of POWER_LOTTO/BIG_LOTTO/DAILY_539, else ValueError
validation_contract.number_lists: predicted/actual main number lists must be sequences of distinct, non-bool ints within game range, exact required length (6 for POWER_LOTTO/BIG_LOTTO, 5 for DAILY_539), else ValueError
validation_contract.power_lotto_second_zone: predicted_second_zone and actual_second_zone both required (1-8 ints); actual_special_number must be None
validation_contract.big_lotto_special_number: actual_special_number required (int in main-number range, not overlapping actual_main_numbers); predicted_second_zone/actual_second_zone must be None
validation_contract.daily_539_aux_fields: predicted_second_zone, actual_second_zone, actual_special_number must all be None
validation_contract.hit_count_special_hit: score_replay_row validates hit_count in [0, max_pick_count] and special_hit in {0,1}, both non-bool ints
validation_contract.immutability: input lists/tuples are never mutated (read via set()/list() copies only)

tier_mapping_traceability.POWER_LOTTO: 10 tiers (POWER_FIRST_PRIZE .. POWER_CONSOLATION_PRIZE, POWER_NO_PRIZE) — exact match to P271B tier_mapping_by_lottery.POWER_LOTTO
tier_mapping_traceability.BIG_LOTTO: 8 tiers (BIG_FIRST_PRIZE .. BIG_CONSOLATION_PRIZE, BIG_NO_PRIZE) — exact match to P271B tier_mapping_by_lottery.BIG_LOTTO
tier_mapping_traceability.DAILY_539: 4 tiers (D539_FIRST_PRIZE .. D539_FOURTH_PRIZE, D539_NO_PRIZE) — exact match to P271B tier_mapping_by_lottery.DAILY_539

fixture_coverage.traceability_test: test_p271b_fixture_matrix_traceability reads outputs/research/p271b_official_prize_rule_scoring_engine_design_20260611.json directly and asserts each fixture's (hit_count, special_hit) -> (tier_class, any_prize_aware_win, is_m3_plus) against score_replay_row()

parallel_feature_design.principle: Prize-aware scoring is a NEW PARALLEL evaluation feature alongside existing M3+/replay scoring. It does not replace, override, migrate, deprecate, or change existing M3+/replay scoring semantics.
parallel_feature_design.module_isolation: No imports of replay.py, DB/repository modules, strategy-selection modules; no registry/API/replay-pipeline registration; pure function, no I/O

next_recommended_task: HOLD / WAITING_FOR_USER_AUTHORIZATION. Standalone prize-aware scorer pure-function module is complete and tested. No replay integration, no batch scoring, no production/API wiring. Any future connection of prize_aware_scorer.py to the replay pipeline, production API, or strategy selection requires a new explicit P271D (or later) authorization with its own STOP conditions.
limitations: Official Taiwan Lottery prize-table pages remain MANUAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED (JS SPAs, not machine-readable). Tier mappings are sourced from internal repo documentation (lottery_api/CLAUDE.md calc_prize docstrings, calculate_win_probability.py) per the P271B design artifact, not from a machine-verified official source.

Module placed at lottery_api/prize_aware_scorer.py (flat module per this task's explicit file whitelist) rather than the P271B-proposed lottery_api/research/prize_aware_scoring/ package path, to avoid creating __init__.py/package configuration (a STOP condition for this task). Function names, signatures, and tier semantics are unchanged from the P271B design.

POWER_LOTTO predicted_special is only ~25% populated in the replay DB (per P271A/P271B); this module performs no DB access and simply requires the caller to supply predicted_second_zone/actual_second_zone explicitly — NULL-to-0 mapping for unpopulated rows remains the caller's responsibility and is out of scope here.
This is a standalone pure-function module with no replay/DB/API/strategy integration. It does not constitute betting advice, a prediction-success claim, or an approved production feature.
